behavior: The default model-free Essentials package has a repeatable macOS arm64 size and native launch baseline without model files, external AI, live sources, credentials, or user data.
revision_scope: The committed launch verifier, exact LaunchServices coalition attribution, observed aggregate RSS sampling, bounded app-scoped cleanup, and the evidence recorded here.

artifact_revision_equivalence.statement: The artifact predates the verifier commit. The only files changed between the artifact source revision and the evidence revision are release verifier and verifier-test files, so application, frontend, Rust, configuration, lockfile, and package inputs are identical.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS JOBSENTINEL_MACOS_NO_ACCOUNT=true npm run tauri:build:macos
commands.relevant_result: Built and ad hoc signed the default arm64 no-account app and DMG, verified the DMG, and wrote its checksum without Apple signing or notarization credentials.
commands.caveat: The artifact reports product version 2.9.5 because v3 is still an unreleased branch. Optional Gatekeeper checks correctly reject the ad hoc, non-notarized artifact.

commands.command: cargo tree --locked --offline -p jobsentinel -e features | rg -q 'candle|hf-hub|tokenizers'; find <mounted-app> -type f | rg -i 'safetensors|onnx|gguf|tokenizer|qwen|minilm'
commands.relevant_result: Both negative searches found no embedded model dependency activation and no model payload file. The check wrapper reported model_free_dependency_and_payload_checks=passed.
commands.caveat: Exit status 1 is the expected no-match result for both rg predicates.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS npm run tauri:verify:macos -- --dmg target/release/bundle/dmg/JobSentinel_2.9.5_aarch64_no-account_macos.dmg --expected-architectures arm64 --expected-bundle-id com.jobsentinel.main --expected-product-name JobSentinel --expected-version 2.9.5 --expected-icon-file icon.icns --expected-minimum-system-version 13.0 --launch-smoke --require-checksum
commands.relevant_result: Three consecutive final-verifier runs passed checksum, DMG integrity, metadata, arm64 architecture, signature integrity, visible native window, isolated local data, owner-only database, 12-second process survival, empty stderr, and app-scoped cleanup.
commands.caveat: These are low-pressure observations on a 64 GiB host, not an 8 GiB responsiveness claim. The visible-window duration is a polling upper bound and RSS is the maximum observed across the exact LaunchServices coalition.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS npm run tauri:verify:macos -- --dmg target/release/bundle/dmg/JobSentinel_2.9.5_aarch64_no-account_macos.dmg --expected-architectures arm64 --expected-bundle-id com.jobsentinel.main --expected-product-name JobSentinel --expected-version 2.9.5 --expected-icon-file icon.icns --expected-minimum-system-version 13.0 --launch-smoke --install-smoke --require-checksum
commands.relevant_result: The same checks passed from both the mounted image and a copied application. The copied app created only the isolated test data tree and owner-only database.
commands.caveat: This proves launch and local-data behavior, not the complete installed Essentials journey.

commands.relevant_result: All 10 expected browser smoke tests passed with no unexpected, flaky, or skipped tests in 26070.156 ms under the 30000 ms suite budget.
commands.caveat: This is a browser mock proxy. It does not prove installed setup, resume import, deterministic matching, tracker update, pay review, and support-report completion.

commands.relevant_result: All 19 focused macOS verifier tests and all 842 script contract tests passed.
commands.caveat: No live source, model, external AI, credential, or Keychain path ran.

commands.command: npm run harness:check; npm run lint:file-size -- --hard; npm run lint:security; git diff --check
commands.relevant_result: Harness state, hard file limits, security sensors, secret scanning, and diff validation passed.
commands.caveat: Two changed verifier files reached the soft modularization review threshold but remain below the enforced hard limit.

commands.command: Independent adversarial review of the performance verifier
commands.relevant_result: After corrections for process attribution, zero-sample rejection, sampling disclosure, historical PID safety, and bounded cleanup, the final reviewer verdict was APPROVE.
commands.caveat: Review does not replace actual modest-hardware or cross-platform measurement.

measurement_contract.startup: Monotonic time from the native open request until the first observed on-screen app window, rounded up.
measurement_contract.memory: Maximum observed aggregate RSS across the exact selected LaunchServices coalition, including app WebKit and app-launched XPC helpers.
measurement_contract.sampling: Sampling begins after the launch request. The synchronous native window probe can create a visible sampling gap, which every result records.
measurement_contract.cleanup: The verifier re-resolves the live coalition, targets the unique launch ASN, waits within a bound, and uses an exact executable-command fallback only when no ASN exists. It never signals a historical PID.

proved: Default macOS arm64 package and installed-app size baseline.
No default embedded model dependency activation or model payload.
Repeatable low-pressure native window and aggregate observed RSS baseline.
Mounted and copied app launch with isolated private local data and empty stderr.
not_proved: Responsiveness, swapping behavior, or memory safety on an actual 8 GiB profile.
Complete installed Essentials journey from setup through support report.
Windows 11, macOS 26 and later, and Linux package and runtime matrix.
Developer ID signing, notarization, and public Gatekeeper acceptance.
gate_4_status.next_trigger: Run the complete installed Essentials journey on actual 8 GiB hardware or an equivalent controlled guest, then extend the package matrix.
